name: Int16.From
signature: Int16.From( value as any, optional culture as nullable text, optional roundingMode as nullable number ) as nullable number
description: Returns a 16-bit integer `number` value from the given `value`. If the given `value` is `null`, `Int16.From` returns `null`. If the given `value` is `number` within the range of 16-bit integer without a fractional part, `value` is returned. If it has fractional part, then the number is rounded with the rounding mode specified. The default rounding mode is [`RoundingMode.ToEven`](roundingmode-type.md). If `value` is of any other type, it will first be converted to a `number` using [`Number.FromText`](number-fromtext.md). Refer to [`Number.Round`](number-round.md) for the available rounding modes. An optional `culture` may also be provided (for example, "en-US").
